text:
Evangelion: DEATH and REBIRTH is a pamphlet sold in some Japanese cinemas when the Evangelion: Death and Rebirth film was released. It was created and sold by GAINAX on 15 March 1997, two versions were created, a regular version and a deluxe version. It was sold for 500 yen the regular version and 1000 yen for the deluxe version.

Overview

The regular pamphlet starts with the introduction of the Evangelion: Death and Rebirth film through several screenshots. It has introductions of Neon Genesis Evangelion characters and a terminology explaining specific terms. It features comments if the voice cast, introduction of the REBIRTH part, film posters, film staff and advertisements for GAINAX derivative products.

The deluxe pamphlet offers more content, including several interviews with the voice actors and the production team. The terminology has longer definitions and there are also several production drawings.
